sql.if: AND (contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT contact_id, writer_id, contact_name, contact_position, contact_email, contact_tel, created_at, updated_at FROM contacts WHERE contact_id = #{contactId}
SELECT contact_id, writer_id, contact_name, contact_position, contact_email, contact_tel, created_at, updated_at FROM contacts ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT contact_id, writer_id, contact_name, contact_position, contact_email, contact_tel, created_at, updated_at FROM contacts
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
